task_completion.description: Open the baseline floor plan in LibreCAD
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD application is open, displaying a 2-car garage floor plan. The title bar or active tab should show 'floorplan.dxf'.

task_completion.description: Create dedicated layers for the HVAC system using standard naming conventions
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layer List panel in LibreCAD shows newly created layers with mechanical/HVAC naming conventions (e.g., 'M-SUPP', 'M-RET', 'M-DUCT', 'HVAC-NOTES').

task_completion.description: Draw supply and return air duct routing
task_completion.visual_evidence: New lines or polylines (often colored or dashed) are drawn over the floor plan, representing ductwork branching out from a central unit to different zones in the garage.

task_completion.description: Mark at least three supply diffuser or register locations with appropriate symbols
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least three new circle symbols (or standard diffuser symbols) are placed on the drawing, typically at the termination points of the supply duct lines.

task_completion.description: Add duct sizing callouts and label the air handler unit
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text annotations are visible near the duct lines indicating sizes (e.g., '8"', '12x10') and a specific text label identifies the Air Handler Unit (e.g., 'AHU', 'FCU') at the origin of the ductwork.

task_completion.description: Add a separate notes layer with a system summary
task_completion.visual_evidence: A block of text summarizing the HVAC system design is visible on the drawing, and the Layer List indicates a dedicated notes layer is active or exists.

task_completion.description: Save the modified drawing to the specified output path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD title bar updates to show 'floorplan_hvac.dxf', or a 'Save As' dialog is visible saving the file to '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan_hvac.dxf'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreCAD GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively using LibreCAD's drawing tools, layer management panel, and text dialogs, rather than modifying the DXF file via terminal scripts or text editors.

integrity.description: The agent manually constructed the HVAC overlay
integrity.visual_evidence: Progressive screenshots show the step-by-step addition of layers, lines, circles, and text, rather than a sudden appearance of a fully completed complex drawing.

integrity.description: The agent modified the provided baseline floor plan
integrity.visual_evidence: The original garage floor plan (walls, doors, dimensions) remains visible underneath the new HVAC overlay, confirming the agent did not just create a new blank file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The baseline file 'floorplan.dxf' contains exactly 967 entities, 24 layers, 9 circles, and 98 text entities. To successfully complete the task, the agent must add at minimum 5 supply duct line entities, 3 diffuser circles, and 3 duct sizing text callouts. The final file must be saved exactly as '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan_hvac.dxf'.
